position_impacts.reasoning: Short-term treasuries benefit from flight to safety and potential Fed cuts, slight price appreciation
Tech stocks hit hard in recession, enterprise spending cuts despite AI thesis, multiple compression
Healthcare relatively defensive but not immune, unemployment reduces employer coverage
Overvalued position benefits from market crash, tech hardware demand collapses in recession
High-growth energy tech gets crushed, capex spending frozen, speculative premium evaporates
Long bonds rally hard as 10Y drops to 2.5%, short position loses significantly
Semiconductor demand collapses in recession despite valuation support, enterprise spending cuts
Creative software faces subscription churn and enterprise budget cuts in recession
Ad revenue plummets in recession, cloud growth slows, regulatory overhang persists

recession.correlation_concerns: Tech positions (CRM, AVGO, ADBE, GOOG) highly correlated in downturn. BE and TLT short create opposite exposures that both lose. Growth stocks across portfolio move together despite different sectors.
hedge_recommendations: Add VIX calls or put spreads on QQQ
Add more treasury duration to offset equity risk
recession.key_risk: BE position represents 15% allocation in high-beta growth stock that could lose 45%+ in recession, creating outsized portfolio drag of -7.2% alone
recession.silver_lining: STX short position benefits from tech selloff, BIL provides stability and slight gains from flight to quality
